# BUG-001 Implementation Report — Branch C (Defensive)

**Generated by:** crash-engineer  
**Date:** 2026-06-05  
**Pipeline step:** 5 — IMPLEMENT  
**Branch:** `fix/BUG-001-c`  
**Worktree:** `.worktrees/fix-BUG-001-c/`

---

## Changes Made

### `src/engine_demo/allocator.cpp`

```cpp no-compile
// BEFORE — buggy bounds check
if (m_offset + n > m_capacity) {
    return nullptr;
}
m_offset = align_up(m_offset, alignment);
std::byte* ptr = m_buffer + m_offset;
m_offset += n;
return ptr;

// AFTER — Branch C defensive variant (explicit wrap-around guard)
const auto aligned = align_up(m_offset, alignment);
if (aligned < m_offset) return nullptr;           // wrap-around guard
if (aligned + n > m_capacity) {
    return nullptr;
}
m_offset = aligned + n;
return m_buffer + aligned;
```

### `tests/engine_demo/test_allocator.cpp`

Removed `DISABLED_` prefix from `DISABLED_third_aligned_alloc_does_not_overrun_arena`.

- [~] Article 8 (Real-time): extra branch in hot path — trade-off accepted for defensive variant
